name: Registry Modification of Run Keys
notes:
This rule detects registry modification of run keys.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Hai Vaknin @LuxNoBulIshit, Avihay eldad  @aloneliassaf, Austin Songer @austinsonger
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Driver Install by pnputil.exe
SIGMA Description: Detects when a possible suspicious driver is being installed via pnputil.exe lolbin


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of pnputil.exe

when the event matches ( LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-i%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/install%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-a%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/add-driver%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.inf%' ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Registry Modification of Run Keys on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of pnputil.exe

AND when the event matches ( 	LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-i%' 	OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/install%' 	OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-a%' 	OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/add-driver%' 	OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.inf%' ) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Registry Modification of Run Keys
Event description: Detects registry modification of run keys.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
